cta.subtitle: Shiga cikakken kwarewar Tariq Islam. Haɗu da ’yan’uwa maza da mata, bi sawun sallolinka, kuma ka ƙarfafa tafiyarka ta imani.

bullets.events: Shiga tarukan al’umma na gida da na duniya
bullets.inspire: Raba tafiyarka ta imani ka kuma ƙarfafa wasu
bullets.tools: Samun albarkatun Musulunci na musamman da kayan aiki

card.bodyAuthed: Samun damar dashboard ɗinka da fasalolin al’umma
card.bodyGuest: Shiga Tariq Islam ka fara haɗuwa da Musulmi a duniya.

explore.title: Bincika Al’ummarka
explore.subtitle: Shiga cikakken kwarewar Tariq Islam. Haɗu da ’yan’uwa maza da mata, bi sawun sallolinka, kuma ka ƙarfafa tafiyarka ta imani.

bullets.events: Shiga tarukan al’umma na gida da na duniya
bullets.inspire: Raba tafiyarka ta imani ka kuma ƙarfafa wasu
bullets.tools: Samun albarkatun Musulunci na musamman da kayan aiki

continue.title: Ci gaba da Tafiyarka
continue.subtitle: Samun damar dashboard ɗinka da fasalolin al’umma

supportMission.title: Tallafa wa Manufa
supportMission.subtitle: Taimaka a ci gaba da Global Muslims Connect kyauta ga Musulmi a duk duniya.

islamicCalendar.title: Kalanda ta Musulunci
islamicCalendar.subtitle: Duba ranar Hijira ta yanzu, bincika watannin Musulunci, kuma gano muhimman bukukuwa da ranaku na Musulunci a tsawon shekara.
islamicCalendar.noUpcoming: Babu manyan ranaku a cikin kwanaki 60 masu zuwa

islamic_new_year.name: Sabuwar Shekarar Musulunci
islamic_new_year.description: Rana ta farko ta Muharram, tana nuna fara sabuwar shekarar kalandar Musulunci.
islamic_new_year.significance: Tana tunatar da Hijira (ƙaura) ta Annabi Muhammad daga Makka zuwa Madina.

day_of_ashura.name: Ranar Ashura
day_of_ashura.description: Rana ta azumi da tunawa a ranar 10 ga Muharram.
day_of_ashura.significance: Ana tunawa da manyan al’amura, ciki har da tsirar Musa daga Fir’auna, da sauran abubuwan tarihi masu muhimmanci.

mawlid_al_nabi.name: Mawlid al-Nabi
mawlid_al_nabi.description: Ranar haihuwar Annabi Muhammad (tsira da amincin Allah su tabbata a gare shi).
mawlid_al_nabi.significance: Ana murnar haihuwar Annabi, kuma Musulmi da dama suna gudanar da tunawa da wannan rana.

laylat_al_miraj.name: Darar Mi'iraji
laylat_al_miraj.description: Darar Isra’i da Mi’iraji na Annabi Muhammad.
laylat_al_miraj.significance: Ana tunawa da tafiyar mu’ujiza daga Makka zuwa Urushalima da kuma hawan sama.

laylat_al_baraah.name: Darar Bara'ah
laylat_al_baraah.description: Dare na gafara, ibada, da tunani a tsakiyar Sha’aban.
laylat_al_baraah.significance: Ana alakanta shi da rahama, gafara, da sabunta zuciya a ibada.

first_day_of_ramadan.name: Farkon Ranar Ramadan
first_day_of_ramadan.significance: Yana fara wata na azumi, sallah, karatun Alƙur’ani, da ƙara ƙoƙari a ibada.

laylat_al_qadr.name: Darar Lailatul Qadr
laylat_al_qadr.description: Darar Qadr, ɗaya daga cikin dararen goma na ƙarshe na Ramadan.
laylat_al_qadr.significance: Darar da aka saukar da Alƙur’ani a farko, ta fi alheri fiye da watanni dubu.

eid_al_fitr.name: Eid al-Fitr
eid_al_fitr.significance: Babban biki da ke nuna ƙarshen Ramadan, ɗaya daga cikin manyan bukukuwan Musulunci.

day_of_arafah.name: Ranar Arafah
day_of_arafah.significance: Ranar tsayuwa a Dutsen Arafat, rana ta gafara da rahama.

eid_al_adha.name: Eid al-Adha
eid_al_adha.significance: Ana tunawa da imani da biyayya ta Ibrahim, kuma yana zo da lokacin ibadar Hajji.

journey.title: Duk Abin da Kake Bukata Don Tafiyarka ta Musulunci
journey.subtitle: Kayan aiki masu cikawa da fasalolin al’umma da aka tsara don Musulmi a duk duniya

qibla.title: Neman Alkibla
qibla.desc: Cikakkiyar alkibla a duk inda kake a duniya ta amfani da GPS

mosques.title: Neman Masallatai
mosques.desc: Nemo masallatai, cibiyoyin Musulunci, da gidajen abinci na halal a yankinka

calendar.title: Kalanda ta Musulunci
calendar.desc: Kada ka rasa muhimman ranakun Musulunci, bukukuwa, da tarukan al’umma

network.title: Hanyar Haɗin Al’umma
network.desc: Haɗu da Musulmi a birninka da kuma a duk duniya

learning.title: Ilimin Musulunci
learning.desc: Samun Alƙur’ani, Hadisi, da darussan Musulunci a harsuna da dama

heritage.title: Gadon Al’adu
heritage.desc: Yi murnar al’adun Musulunci ka kuma raba kwarewar al’adu daga ko’ina cikin duniya

cta.title: Ka shirya ka shiga al’ummarmu?
cta.subtitle: Fara tafiyarka tare da dubban Musulmi a duniya da suka sami gidansu na ruhaniya ta wannan manhaja.

toasts.signInRequiredDescNetwork: Da fatan za a shiga domin shiga hanyar haɗin al’umma.
toasts.signInRequiredDescChat: Da fatan za a shiga domin shiga tattaunawar al’umma.
toasts.islamicLearningDesc: Bincika sashen Alƙur’ani ka saurari karatuttuka
